creator: khorben@defora.org
text:
Created attachment 247105
0001-deforaos-take-over-maintainership.patch

I am the original author of the DeforaOS desktop environment, that has been packaged and maintained by ocochard@ all these years. (Thanks!)

With his knowledge and agreement I am offering to be listed as the official maintainer of these packages in FreeBSD, and will of course welcome his assistance and supervision in this process.
